_comment: v9 corpus manifest — Swift arm. The .template.json is committed; the operator copies this to corpus-manifest-swift.local.json (gitignored, see the **/corpus-manifest.local.json rule) and fills in the local_clone_path for each repo. See v9-plan-2026-07-02-update.md for the corpus build process and methodology-minimum-sample-size.md for the guardrails (10k files per arm, 10 fires per DORMANT rule, 5% parse-failure ceiling).

neg_repos.name: alamofire
neg_repos.rationale: Alamofire pre-5.0; canonical Swift networking; pre-AI

neg_repos.name: snapkit
neg_repos.rationale: SnapKit pre-5.0; Auto Layout DSL; pre-AI

neg_repos.name: moya
neg_repos.rationale: Moya pre-12.0; Swift networking abstraction; pre-AI

neg_repos.name: swift-nio
neg_repos.rationale: Apple SwiftNIO pre-2.0; async I/O; pre-AI

neg_repos.name: realm-swift
neg_repos.rationale: Realm Swift pre-4.0; mobile DB; pre-AI

pos_repos.name: openai-swift
pos_repos.rationale: OpenAI Swift client; LLM SDK; post-2024-12

pos_repos.name: swift-llm
pos_repos.rationale: swift-llm; on-device LLM inference in Swift

pos_repos.name: swift-transformers
pos_repos.rationale: Hugging Face Swift Transformers; LLM tooling in Swift

v8_corpus_avoidance: Verify these repos were NOT in the v7 or v8 corpus (per methodology-minimum-sample-size.md's cross-corpus contamination guard). grep -l any of these names under ~/.slopbrick-cache/v7-repos/ or v8-repos/ before running.
build_process: 2. For each repo, run: git fetch --unshallow && git checkout <ref>
3. Compute the filelist (handled by build-v9-corpus.ts --ext swift --arm swift)

success_criteria.rules_measurable: ≥ 5 (the 5 new Swift rules, scheduled for v0.25)
success_criteria.rules_promoted: ≥ 1 (at least one Swift rule becomes USEFUL on v9)
